meaning: n.(天主教教堂里)圣器收藏室,圣器安置所
examples: It houses the sacristy and rectory, and becomes the bell tower.
Sacristy sideboard for paraments, Lombardy end of 700, larch wood.
The entrance of the church has access to the sacristy, the chorus, the main hall and the chapel of the Blessed.
The IPCC said the allegation was not part of Operation Sacristy, a probe into alleged corruption at the force.
Operation Sacristy, a separate criminal investigation into allegations against Mr Price, Mr Bonnard and others is also under way.
